creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 255728
patch

While attempting to update databases/greptimedb with the attached patch I encountered this failure:

> ===>   Updating Cargo.lock
> error: failed to load manifest for workspace member `/usr/ports/databases/greptimedb/work/greptimedb-0.10.2/src/api`
> referenced by workspace at `/usr/ports/databases/greptimedb/work/greptimedb-0.10.2/Cargo.toml`
> <...skipped...>
> Caused by:
>   dependency (meter-macros) specified without providing a local path, Git repository, version, or workspace dependency to use
> *** Error code 101

This is likely caused by the meter-macros dependency sourced from a GitHub revision in Cargo.toml:
> meter-core = { git = "https://github.com/GreptimeTeam/greptime-meter.git", rev = "a10facb353b41460eeb98578868ebf19c2084fac" }


Please advise how to proceed.


Thanks,
Yuri
